9:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s."cdscode") AS directly_charter_funded_schools_count
FROM satscores sats
JOIN schools s ON sats."cds" = s."cdscode"
WHERE sats."avgscrmath" > 560
  AND s."fundingtype" LIKE '%Directly funded%';
13:
SELECT
    s."phone" AS school_phone
FROM
    satscores sat
JOIN
    schools s ON sat."cds" = s."cdscode"
WHERE
    sat."numtsttakr" > 0
ORDER BY
    (sat."numge1500"::numeric / sat."numtsttakr"::numeric) DESC
LIMIT 3;
17:
SELECT
    s."charternum" AS charter_number,
    s."school" AS school_name,
    AVG(CAST(ss."avgscrwrite" AS INTEGER)) AS avg_writing_score
FROM
    "satscores" ss
JOIN
    "schools" s ON ss."cds" = s."cdscode"
WHERE
    CAST(ss."avgscrwrite" AS INTEGER) > 499
    AND s."charternum" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    s."charternum", s."school"
ORDER BY
    avg_writing_score DESC;
325:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m."molecule_id") AS carcinogenic_nitrogen_molecules_count
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
WHERE m."label" = '+'
  AND LOWER(a."element") = 'n';
279:
SELECT m."label"
FROM "bond" b
JOIN "molecule" m ON b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
WHERE b."bond_id" = 'TR001_10_11';
276:
SELECT DISTINCT
    c."atom_id" AS first_atom_id,
    c."atom_id2" AS second_atom_id
FROM
    "connected" c
JOIN
    "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE
    b."bond_type" = '#'
ORDER BY
    first_atom_id, second_atom_id;
498:
SELECT DISTINCT st_translation.translation AS french_set_name
FROM set_translations st_card
JOIN cards c ON st_card.setcode = c.setcode
JOIN sets s ON c.setcode = s.code
JOIN set_translations st_translation ON s.code = st_translation.setcode
WHERE st_card.language = 'French'
  AND st_card.translation LIKE '%Tendo Ice Bridge%'
  AND st_translation.language = 'French';
417:
SELECT
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN s."type" = 'expansion' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_japanese_expansion
FROM
    "set_translations" st
JOIN
    "sets" s ON st."setcode" = s."code"
WHERE
    st."language" = 'Japanese';
345:
SELECT
    c."name" AS card_name,
    l."status" AS vintage_legality_status
FROM
    "cards" c
JOIN
    "legalities" l ON c."uuid" = l."uuid"
WHERE
    
    c."types" LIKE '%Artifact%'
    
    AND c."side" IS NULL
    
    AND l."format" = 'vintage'
ORDER BY
    c."name";
1533:
SELECT
    t."customerid",
    y."consumption" AS august_2012_consumption
FROM
    "transactions_1k" t
JOIN
    "yearmonth" y ON t."customerid" = y."customerid"
    AND y."date" = 201208  
WHERE
    t."productid" = 5
    AND (t."price" / NULLIF(t."amount", 0)) > 29.00
1480:
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ym."date"::text, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
    SUM(ym."consumption") AS total_consumption
FROM
    "yearmonth" ym
JOIN
    "customers" c ON ym."customerid" = c."customerid"
WHERE
    c."segment" = 'SME'
    AND ym."date" BETWEEN 201301 AND 201312
GROUP BY
    TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ym."date"::text, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY
    total_consumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1529:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN t."customerid" = 38508 THEN t."price" ELSE 0 END) AS total_amount_spent,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t."customerid" = 38508 AND ym."date" = 201201 THEN ym."consumption" ELSE 0 END) AS january_2012_amount
FROM
    "transactions_1k" t
LEFT JOIN
    "yearmonth" ym ON t."customerid" = ym."customerid"
WHERE
    t."customerid" = 38508;
1472:
SELECT
    c."customerid",
    c."segment",
    SUM(ym."consumption") AS total_consumption
FROM
    "yearmonth" ym
JOIN
    "customers" c ON ym."customerid" = c."customerid"
WHERE
    ym."date" BETWEEN 201201 AND 201212
    AND c."segment" = 'LAM'
GROUP BY
    c."customerid", c."segment"
ORDER BY
    total_consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
180:
SELECT DISTINCT c."client_id"
FROM "client" c
JOIN "disp" d ON c."client_id" = d."client_id"
JOIN "account" a ON d."account_id" = a."account_id"
JOIN "district" dist ON a."district_id" = dist."district_id"
WHERE c."birth_date" BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
  AND dist."a3" LIKE '%east Bohemia%';
113:
SELECT
    c."birth_date" AS birthday
FROM
    "client" c
JOIN
    "disp" d ON c."client_id" = d."client_id"
JOIN
    "account" a ON d."account_id" = a."account_id"
JOIN
    "loan" l ON a."account_id" = l."account_id"
WHERE
    l."amount" = 98832
    AND l."date" = '1996-01-03'::date;
589:
SELECT
    "id" AS user_id
FROM
    "users"
ORDER BY
    "reputation" DESC
LIMIT 1;
685:
SELECT
    p."viewcount" AS total_views,
    COALESCE(u."displayname", p."ownerdisplayname") AS user_who_posted_last
FROM
    "posts" p
LEFT JOIN
    "users" u ON p."lasteditoruserid" = u."id"
WHERE
    
    (LOWER(p."body") LIKE '%computer game datasets%'
     OR LOWER(p."title") LIKE '%computer game datasets%')
ORDER BY
    p."lasteditdate" DESC
LIMIT 1;
1365:
WITH min_remaining_budget AS (
    SELECT
        "budget_id"
    FROM
        "budget"
    ORDER BY
        "remaining"::numeric ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    e."expense_id",
    e."expense_description",
    e."expense_date",
    e."cost",
    e."approved",
    m."first_name" || ' ' || m."last_name" AS member_name
FROM
    "expense" e
JOIN
    "member" m ON e."link_to_member" = m."member_id"
WHERE
    e."link_to_budget" = (SELECT "budget_id" FROM min_remaining_budget)
ORDER BY
    e."cost" DESC;
1388:
SELECT
    m."first_name" || ' ' || m."last_name" AS full_name,
    i."source" AS income_source,
    SUM(CAST(i."amount" AS NUMERIC)) AS total_income
FROM
    "member" m
JOIN
    "income" i ON m."member_id" = i."link_to_member"
GROUP BY
    full_name, income_source
ORDER BY
    total_income DESC
LIMIT 1;
1339:
SELECT AVG(e."cost") AS average_cost
FROM "expense" e
JOIN "member" m ON e."link_to_member" = m."member_id"
WHERE m."first_name" LIKE '%Elijah%'
  AND m."last_name" LIKE '%Allen%'
  AND TO_DATE(e."expense_date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN '2019-09-01' AND '2019-10-31';
1359:
WITH yearly_kickoff_amount AS (
    SELECT SUM(b."amount") AS total_amount
    FROM "budget" b
    JOIN "event" e ON b."link_to_event" = e."event_id"
    WHERE b."category" = 'Advertisement'
    AND e."event_name" LIKE '%Yearly Kickoff%'
    AND e."type" LIKE '%Meeting%'
),
october_meeting_amount AS (
    SELECT SUM(b."amount") AS total_amount
    FROM "budget" b
    JOIN "event" e ON b."link_to_event" = e."event_id"
    WHERE b."category" = 'Advertisement'
    AND e."event_name" LIKE '%October Meeting%'
    AND e."type" LIKE '%Meeting%'
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN om.total_amount = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE yk.total_amount::FLOAT / om.total_amount
    END AS budget_ratio
FROM yearly_kickoff_amount yk, october_meeting_amount om;
1429:
SELECT e."event_name"
FROM "event" e
JOIN "attendance" a ON e."event_id" = a."link_to_event"
JOIN "member" m ON a."link_to_member" = m."member_id"
WHERE e."type" = 'Social'
  AND m."position" = 'Vice President'
  AND e."location" LIKE '%900 E. Washington St.%'
LIMIT 1;
